hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Friendly chat at a coffee break (like + -ing + small-talk questions) -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 14 -- Small Talk with Colleagues -- Chatting at a Coffee Break
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 14 -- Small Talk with Colleagues

listenings.text: Hi! I am Rachel. Let me tell you about my weekend. On Saturday, the weather was sunny, so I went to the park. I really enjoy walking outside. In the afternoon, I painted a picture. Painting is my favorite hobby, and it helps me relax. On Sunday, I stayed at home and read a good book. I love reading on quiet mornings. In my free time, I also enjoy cooking for my family. How about you? What do you like doing on weekends?

Hello, this is Danilo. Let me tell you what I like doing in my free time. After work, I enjoy playing football with my friends. On weekends, I like cooking, and I always relax with a good movie. I do not like staying inside when the weather is nice, so I often go for a walk in the park. Reading is my favorite hobby, and I read every night before bed. A short chat with my colleagues is fun too. I really enjoy talking over coffee before a meeting.
